falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β1 (export promotion × competition) is positive and significant at p<0.10 while β2 (export promotion × protection) is insignificant or negative. PARTIAL if both are positive but β1 > β2. REFUTED if β2 is positive and significantly larger than β1, or if both are insignificant. INFORMATIVE: excluding China and Korea should not eliminate β1; if it does, the result is driven by two East Asian developmental states.
